top_signals.title: Stock Rally Pauses, Oil Heads for Weekly Decline: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global stocks retreated in holiday-thinned trading as investors weighed whether a 60-day diplomatic push between the US and Iran could yield a nuclear accord and a more durable peace agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
